exampleContent.sectionSubtitle: Real prompts and articles from this template

prompts.title: Example Action Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Practical tasks to move your e commerce store forward
items: Research and analyze your top 3 competitor e-commerce stores in your niche
Contact and establish relationships with 3 potential product suppliers by requesting samples and pricing information
Research and secure wholesale agreements with 3 qualified product manufacturers to establish reliable inventory sourcing
Order and evaluate product samples from your top 3 potential suppliers to assess quality, packaging, and brand alignment
Evaluate and negotiate minimum order quantities with your top 3 suppliers to optimize inventory investment and cash flow
Define your target customer persona by creating detailed profiles of your ideal buyers
